description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof covered with textured, overlapping shingles, giving it a rustic, traditional appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, stucco-like material, accented by dark wooden beams in a half-timbered style, reminiscent of Tudor or medieval European architecture. The front facade includes a small, dark-colored door and two windows, one of which is protected by a wooden shutter, while the other has a decorative lattice. The side and rear views reveal minimal window openings and a prominent chimney rising from the roof ridge. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper floor slightly overhanging the lower, and the overall footprint is compact and rectangular. The house exudes a cozy, old-world charm suitable for a quaint urban neighborhood or historical district.
description: A two-story, half-timbered house with a steep gable roof, textured shingles, and a rustic, medieval European aesthetic. Features include a small front door, decorative windows, and a prominent chimney.
description_view_0: Front and side of the house showing the main entry door, two windows (one with a shutter, one with lattice), and the overhanging upper story.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the gable roof, central window with shutter, and the symmetrical facade.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the plain wall with minimal openings and the continuation of the roof and timber accents.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the shingled roof, chimney, and a mostly unadorned wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Small, dark door with no porch, accented by timber framing and a window with a wooden shutter above.
